name: getConfluence
description:
ALWAYS USE THIS TOOL for all Confluence operations. Never infer Confluence page content from conversation history — always fetch it fresh with op='read'. Supports create, append, read, list, delete, move, and raw API operations. Images and files must be referenced via public http/https URLs — local file paths are not supported. Markdown input is automatically converted to Confluence storage format.
MULTI-WORKER: Multiple agents may append to DIFFERENT pages in parallel safely. Writing to the SAME page from multiple agents simultaneously causes version conflicts — serialize writes to the same page (one agent at a time).

imageUrl.description: Must start with http/https. Will be uploaded as an attachment.

imageUrls.description: All must start with http/https. Will be uploaded as attachments.

fileUrl.description: Any http/https URL — uploaded as an attachment.

embed.description: create/append: images embed inline by default; attach: default false (upload only).
